news.title:
ABB India rose 3.3% intraday on 10 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 6,178.05.
It outperformed Sensex's 0.55% gain, leading the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector.
news.summary:
ABB India rose 3.3% intraday on 10 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 6,178.05.
It outperformed Sensex's 0.55% gain, leading the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector.

news.title: ABB India plans $75M investment in manufacturing & R&D by 2026.
news.summary: ABB India plans $75M investment in manufacturing & R&D by 2026.

news.title:
ABB India's Dec 2025 net sales rose 5.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 3,557.01 cr; net profit fell 18.1% to Rs 432.85 cr.
EBITDA dropped 16.3% Y-o-Y to Rs 622.58 cr; EPS decreased to Rs 20.43 from Rs 24.93 in Dec 2024.
news.summary:
ABB India's Dec 2025 net sales rose 5.7% Y-o-Y to Rs 3,557.01 cr; net profit fell 18.1% to Rs 432.85 cr.
EBITDA dropped 16.3% Y-o-Y to Rs 622.58 cr; EPS decreased to Rs 20.43 from Rs 24.93 in Dec 2024.

news.title:
ABB India reported robust Q4 CY2025 results with highest-ever orders of INR 14,115 crore, 8% growth YoY, and revenue of INR 13,203 crore.
Sustainability initiatives included AWS Gold Certification, while strong order momentum emerged from transport, infrastructure, and renewables sectors.
news.summary:
ABB India reported robust Q4 CY2025 results with highest-ever orders of INR 14,115 crore, 8% growth YoY, and revenue of INR 13,203 crore.
Sustainability initiatives included AWS Gold Certification, while strong order momentum emerged from transport, infrastructure, and renewables sectors.

news.title:
ABB India executed a Rs. 29.1 crore NSE block trade for 47,858 shares.
The shares were priced at Rs. 6083.5 each in the transaction.
news.summary:
ABB India executed a Rs. 29.1 crore NSE block trade for 47,858 shares.
The shares were priced at Rs. 6083.5 each in the transaction.

news.title: ABB revises profit margin forecast from 16.9% to 12-15%, indicating challenges.
news.summary: ABB revises profit margin forecast from 16.9% to 12-15%, indicating challenges.

news.title:
ABB India management sees positive demand outlook with market revival in 2026.
The revival is expected to be driven by private capital expenditures.
news.summary:
ABB India management sees positive demand outlook with market revival in 2026.
The revival is expected to be driven by private capital expenditures.

news.title:
ABB India targets 12-15% PAT margins and double-digit revenue growth.
These projections were shared during ABB India's recent concall updates.
news.summary:
ABB India targets 12-15% PAT margins and double-digit revenue growth.
These projections were shared during ABB India's recent concall updates.

news.title: ABB India Ltd held its Q4 2025 Earnings Conference Call on Feb 23, 2026.
news.summary: ABB India Ltd held its Q4 2025 Earnings Conference Call on Feb 23, 2026.

news.title: ABB India projects sharp correction; EBITDA margins lower, aided by forex gains of 180-200 bps.
news.summary: ABB India projects sharp correction; EBITDA margins lower, aided by forex gains of 180-200 bps.

news.title:
ABB's Q4 EBITDA margin rose 1.7% due to forex and commodity gains.
Forex gain in Q4CY25 was ₹62 crore, versus a ₹40 crore loss previously.
news.summary:
ABB's Q4 EBITDA margin rose 1.7% due to forex and commodity gains.
Forex gain in Q4CY25 was ₹62 crore, versus a ₹40 crore loss previously.

news.title: ABB India shows strong growth trajectory with CAGR growth in the data center market.
news.summary: ABB India shows strong growth trajectory with CAGR growth in the data center market.

news.title:
ABB India executed a block trade on NSE for ~100,942 shares at Rs. 6,108.
The total transaction value of the trade stood at Rs. 61.66 crores.
news.summary:
ABB India executed a block trade on NSE for ~100,942 shares at Rs. 6,108.

news.title:
ABB India shares fell 2.8% to ₹5,715 despite Q4 orders jumping 52%. Analysts predict up to 19% downside.
Brokerages like UBS, Macquarie, and Nomura maintained neutral/reduce ratings citing mixed earnings signals and high valuations.
news.summary:
ABB India shares fell 2.8% to ₹5,715 despite Q4 orders jumping 52%. Analysts predict up to 19% downside.
Brokerages like UBS, Macquarie, and Nomura maintained neutral/reduce ratings citing mixed earnings signals and high valuations.

news.title:
UBS retains a neutral rating on ABB India with a target of ₹5,310.
Electrification and motion revenues grew 6% and 7% YoY; base order growth key for re-rating.
news.summary:
UBS retains a neutral rating on ABB India with a target of ₹5,310.
Electrification and motion revenues grew 6% and 7% YoY; base order growth key for re-rating.

news.title:
Waaree Energies plans ₹8,000 crore battery facility; ABB India Q4 revenue rose 5.7% YoY to ₹3,557 crore, net profit fell 18% to ₹433 crore.
Karur Vysya Bank cuts 1-yr MCLR to 9.1%; Federal Bank gets ₹686 crore tax refund; Texmaco-RVNL JV to enhance rail manufacturing capabilities.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies plans ₹8,000 crore battery facility; ABB India Q4 revenue rose 5.7% YoY to ₹3,557 crore, net profit fell 18% to ₹433 crore.
Karur Vysya Bank cuts 1-yr MCLR to 9.1%; Federal Bank gets ₹686 crore tax refund; Texmaco-RVNL JV to enhance rail manufacturing capabilities.

news.title:
ABB India reports Q4 orders at a 5-year peak; revenue surpasses estimates.
ABB India proposes a dividend following strong quarterly performance.
news.summary:
ABB India reports Q4 orders at a 5-year peak; revenue surpasses estimates.
ABB India proposes a dividend following strong quarterly performance.

news.title:
ABB India forecasts a 12% rise in order backlog to ₹10,471 crore by Dec 31, 2025.
This increase is expected to boost the company's revenue visibility and growth prospects.
news.summary:
ABB India forecasts a 12% rise in order backlog to ₹10,471 crore by Dec 31, 2025.
This increase is expected to boost the company's revenue visibility and growth prospects.

news.title:
ABB India posted Q4 CY25 net profit of ₹433 crore on revenue of ₹3,557 crore.
EBITDA stood at ₹545.6 crore with a margin of 15.3%.
news.summary:
ABB India posted Q4 CY25 net profit of ₹433 crore on revenue of ₹3,557 crore.
EBITDA stood at ₹545.6 crore with a margin of 15.3%.

news.title:
ABB India board approves final dividend of Rs.29.6/share for FY2025, pending shareholder approval.
Dividend applies to 21.19 crore equity shares; record date set for May 2, 2026, AGM on May 9, 2026.
news.summary:
ABB India board approves final dividend of Rs.29.6/share for FY2025, pending shareholder approval.
Dividend applies to 21.19 crore equity shares; record date set for May 2, 2026, AGM on May 9, 2026.
